title: Alba Thermal Springs  -  Fire & Ice Circuits
summary: The quieter Peninsula thermal complex runs its hot-and-cold bathing circuit year-round, with dedicated silent sessions and sunrise slots that make the category make sense again.
kidsGradeNote: Alba is the Peninsula's adults-only thermal option. Leave the kids with the grandparents; this is the point.
editorVerdict: The sharpest late-afternoon thermal session on the Peninsula right now. Worth booking if you want a rain-proof adult reset that still feels like an outing.
editorNote:
Alba's live Fire and Ice-style thermal programming is currently the cleanest rain-proof reset on the Peninsula. The ticketing caps bather numbers, the architecture earns the spend, and the whole thing works far better as a half-day weather play than as a novelty event card.

Book an afternoon session, keep lunch nearby in Red Hill or Merricks, and treat Alba as the weather-proof hinge in the day rather than the whole itinerary. If conditions are grey, this is one of the safest adult recommendations on the Peninsula.

Check the live schedule before booking, because session formats and timings move.
